About Me

Driven by Data & Logistics

📦

Logistics Management

Passionate about optimizing supply chain operations, inventory control, and end-to-end logistics management. Committed to streamlining processes for maximum operational efficiency across industries.

📊

Business Analytics

Enthusiastic about turning raw data into actionable insights. Skilled in applying analytical frameworks to support data-driven decision-making and business strategy formulation.

🔗

Supply Chain Operations

Well-versed in supply chain principles, procurement strategies, and vendor coordination. Eager to apply academic knowledge in real-world supply chain environments.

⚙️

Process Optimization

Focused on identifying inefficiencies and implementing structured process improvements. Believe that continuous improvement is the cornerstone of operational excellence.

Academic Projects

Operational Excellence in Textile Manufacturing

An in-depth study analyzing production workflow, quality assurance mechanisms, and process optimization strategies within textile manufacturing units. The project examined bottlenecks in the production pipeline and proposed data-informed improvements to enhance overall operational efficiency and reduce waste.
